qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_lugar_atencion as oi_lugar_atencion, t0.c_lugar_atencion as c_lugar_atencion, t0.d_lugar_atencion as d_lugar_atencion, SEC.policy, t0.c_lugar_atencion as CODE, t0.d_lugar_atencion as TEXT FROM MED07_LUGARES_ATEN as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.LugaresAtencion.LUGAR_ATENCION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_lugar_atencion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_lugar_atencion asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_lugar_atencion as oi_lugar_atencion, SEC.policy FROM MED07_LUGARES_ATEN as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.LugaresAtencion.LUGAR_ATENCION\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_lugar_atencion LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_lugar_atencion asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.LugaresAtencion.LUGAR_ATENCION.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.MedicinaLaboral.LugaresAtencion.LUGAR_ATENCION.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(MED07_LUGARES_ATEN.oi_lugar_atencion) as CNT from MED07_LUGARES_ATEN Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and MED07_LUGARES_ATEN.oi_lugar_atencion={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(MED07_LUGARES_ATEN.d_lugar_atencion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(MED07_LUGARES_ATEN.c_lugar_atencion,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
